query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.investmentAmount,
  p.cashBalance AS current_cashBalance,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'deposit' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_deposits,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'buy' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_buys,
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'sell' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_sells,
  (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'deposit' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) 
   - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'buy' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0)
   + COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'sell' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS calculated_cashBalance
FROM savedPortfolios p
LEFT JOIN portfolioTransactions pt ON p.id = pt.portfolioId
WHERE p.id = 870001
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.investmentAmount, p.cashBalance;

  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'sell' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS total_sells,
  (COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'deposit' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0) 
   - COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'buy' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0)
   + COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN pt.type = 'sell' THEN CAST(pt.totalAmountCHF AS DECIMAL(15,2)) ELSE 0 END), 0)) AS calculated_cashBalance
FROM savedPortfolios p
LEFT JOIN portfolioTransactions pt ON p.id = pt.portfolioId
WHERE p.id = 870001
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.investmentAmount, p.cashBalance;
